markdown:
#  Share Submittal Attachments (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * PDF attachments that contain markups cannot be shared and will not have a share icon.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Submittals** tool on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Open the relevant submittal.
  3. Tap the attachment that you want to share.
  4. Tap the **share** ![Icon Share Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/85b62f81b446cab15e9d3e40a9b61495/dfecbbcee76e8964a472d72bd3ecefb3/icon-share-android.png?fm=webp&h=17) icon.
  5. Choose from the list of available actions to share the attachment. _Note:_ Available actions may differ depending on your mobile device and the file type of the selected attachment.


## See Also
  * [Download Submittals Attachments (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/download-submittals-attachments-android)
  * [View a Submittal (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/view-a-submittal-android)
  * [View Submittal PDF Attachments (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/view-submittal-pdf-attachments-android)
title: Share Submittal Attachments (Android)
description: How to share, export, or download a submittal's attachments on an android mobile device.
